Patch Set 3: Published edit on patch set 2.

Patch Set 2:

I attempted to fix the build errors present in this patch and succeeded. Yay! Now, keep in mind I barely have any idea what I am doing, so please doublecheck the changes I made to make sure they make sense.

This service is only provided in hopes to be useful and reduce latency from push to getting actual results in the face of trivial code errors

Here's summary of my changes:
The change adds the missing `#include <ctype.h>` header to `liblustreapi_util.c`. This was necessary to resolve compile errors caused by the use of functions from the `ctype.h` library (such as `isalpha`, `isdigit`, etc.) in the code, which were likely introduced or referenced in a previous patch but lacked the required header inclusion. Adding this header ensures proper compilation by providing the necessary function declarations.

parents.subject: LU-19330 tests: sanity-lfsck/45 to wait for reconnection

commit.subject: LU-19296 changelog: retrive changelog user info from MDT
commit.message:
LU-19296 changelog: retrive changelog user info from MDT

This patch uses RPC MDS_GET_INFO with new key KEY_CHANGELOG_USER
to retrive changelog user information on server side:
- Add new handler mdt_changelog_get_user_info() to extract RPC
  request and forward data to MDD layer by mdd_iocontrol().
- Use mdd_iocontrol() with new ioctl OBD_IOC_CHANGELOG_FILTER to
  call new function mdd_changelog_user_lookup() to implement
  changelog user lookup in MDD layer.

Signed-off-by: Emoly Liu <emoly@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I76ee5d8dda8eefcf221e08ab892485d64d55fb11
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61538
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@dilger.ca>
Reviewed-by: Robert Read <rread@ddn.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
